UnitAbilities.Title: Greater Daemon of Khorne (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Khorne Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6" of this model, that unit is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos.

UnitAbilities.Title: Rage Embodied (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Khorne Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6" of this model, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Murderlust
UnitAbilities.Text: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-7 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s Slaughter and Carnage.

Options: axe of Khorne and lash of Khorne

UnitAbilities.Title: Greater Daemon of Khorne (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Khorne Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6" of this model, that unit is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos.

UnitAbilities.Title: Daemon Lord of Khorne (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Khorne Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Relentless Carnage
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of the Fight phase, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model and roll eight D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-6 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Lord of Decapitations
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Skulls for Khorne
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a Character unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll. Each time this model destroys an enemy Character unit, you gain 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Bloodmaster
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: A Gory Path
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model’s unit Consolidates, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

UnitAbilities.Title: Skullmaster’s Fury
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time that unit ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, Juggernaut’s bladed horns equipped by models in that unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Devastating Charge
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model’s unit ends a Charge move, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of that unit must take a Battle-shock test.

UnitAbilities.Title: Blood Throne
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this model. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly Khorne Legiones Daemonica unit makes an attack that targets that unit, improve the Strength, Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of that attack by 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Champion Slayer
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets a Character or Monster unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll. Each time this model destroys an enemy Character or Monster unit, this model regains up to D6 lost wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Daemonic Icon
UnitAbilities.Text: Models in the bearer’s unit have a Leadership characteristic of 6+.

UnitAbilities.Title: Instrument of Chaos
UnitAbilities.Text: Add 1 to Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Bane of Cowards
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability Falls Back, models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests. When doing so, if that enemy unit is also Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

UnitAbilities.Title: Daemonic Icon
UnitAbilities.Text: Models in the bearer’s unit have a Leadership characteristic of 6+.

UnitAbilities.Title: Instrument of Chaos
UnitAbilities.Text: Add 1 to Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Brass Stampede
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this unit and roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Collar of Khorne
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 3+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

UnitAbilities.Title: Hunters from the Warp
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

UnitAbilities.Title: Skulls of the Fallen
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

UnitAbilities.Title: Shadow of Khorne (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: The area of the battlefield within 6" of this Fortification is considered to be within your army’s Shadow of Chaos. In addition, while a friendly Khorne Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6" of this Fortification, each time you take a Battle-shock test for that unit, you can re-roll that test.

UnitAbilities.Title: Cover
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Fortification, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fortification
UnitAbilities.Text:
While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more Fortifications from your army:
 ▪ That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made, unless it is made with a Pistol, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
 ▪ Models in that unit so not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battle-shocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

UnitAbilities.Title: Greater Daemon of Tzeentch (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Tzeentch Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6" of this model, that unit is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos.

UnitAbilities.Title: One Head Looks Forward (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, take a Leadership test for this model; if that test is passed, you gain 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: One Head Looks Back (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per turn, when your opponent targets a unit from their army within 12" of this model with a stratagem, you can use this ability. If you do, increase the CP cost of the use of that stratagem by 1CP.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-7 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Greater Daemon of Tzeentch (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Tzeentch Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6" of this model, that unit is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos.

UnitAbilities.Title: Daemon Lord of Tzeentch (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Tzeentch Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

UnitAbilities.Title: Master of Magicks (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, select one of the following abilities [IGNORES COVER]; [LETHAL HITS]; [SUSTAINED HITS D3]. Until the end of the phase, this model’s Bolt of Change has that ability.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-6 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Formless Horror
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an enemy unit wishes to select this model as the target of an attack, that unit must first take a Battle-shock test. If that test is failed, in addition to being Battle-shocked, that enemy unit cannot target this model this phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Mischief and Confusion
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to this model and roll one D6: on a 2-5, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll; on a 6, that enemy unit is not eligible to shoot this phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fateskimmer
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Rider of the Immaterial Winds
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if this model’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove that unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fluxmaster
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time an attack is made against that unit, subtract 1 form the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Altered Reality (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, after a Hit roll, a Wound roll or a saving throw is made for this model, you can change the result of that roll to an unmodified 6.

UnitAbilities.Title: P’tarix’s Sorcerous Syphon (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While an enemy unit is within 12" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes a Psychic Attack, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Xirat’p’s Sorcerous Barrages (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your Movement phase, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 6" of this model; on a 2-3, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 4-5, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that unit suffers D6 mortal wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Changecaster
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Storm of Mutating Sorcery (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy Infantry unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

UnitAbilities.Title: Split
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a Blue Horror model in this unit is destroyed, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, if this unit is not destroyed, roll one D6 for that model. On a 4+, add one Brimstone Horror model to this unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Cackling Horrors (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit, if this unit contains one or more Blue Horror models, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that enemy unit by 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Exploding Horrors
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit is selected to fight, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it, then select one or more Brimstone Horror models in this unit. For each Brimstone Horror model you select, roll one D6: on a 4+, that model is destroyed and that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

UnitAbilities.Title: Daemonic Icon
UnitAbilities.Text: Models in the bearer’s unit have a Leadership characteristic of 6+.

UnitAbilities.Title: Instrument of Chaos
UnitAbilities.Text: Add 1 to Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Split
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a Pink Horror or Blue Horror model in this unit is destroyed, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, if this unit is not destroyed, roll one D6 for that model. On a 4+, if it was a Pink Horror, add two Blue Horror models to this unit, and if it was a Blue Horror, add one Brimstone Horror model to this unit.

Infos.Title: HORRORS ARE PINK. HORRORS ARE BLUE. WHEREONCE THERE WAS ONE, NOW THERE ARE TWO.
Infos.Text: If, at any point, this unit contains no Pink Horror models, use the Blue Horrors datasheet for this unit.

Infos.Title: Designer's Note
Infos.Text: While this unit contains one or more Pink Horror models, the Sullen Malevolence and Exploding Horrors abilities from the Blue Horrors datasheet do not apply to this unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Bounding Leaps
UnitAbilities.Text: This unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

UnitAbilities.Title: Blazing Warpfire (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Flames of Change (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) hit by one or more of those attacks, and roll one D6. On a 4+, until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that enemy unit is aflame. While a unit is aflame, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for it.

Infos.Title: MANIFESTATION OF DESTRUCTION
Infos.Text: This model cannot be your Warlord and cannot be given Enhancements.

UnitAbilities.Title: Slashing Dive
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Movement phase, after this unit ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

UnitAbilities.Title: Eldritch Flames (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

UnitAbilities.Title: Greater Daemon of Nurgle (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Nurgle Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6" of this model, that unit is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos.

UnitAbilities.Title: Virulent Blessing (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of the Fight phase, you can select one enemy unit within 24" and visible to this model. Until the end of the phase, each time an attack made by a Nurgle Legiones Daemonica model is allocated to a model in that unit, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack.

UnitAbilities.Title: Deluge of Nurgle (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, subtract 2 from the Move characteristic and subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-7 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Greater Daemon of Nurgle (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Nurgle Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6" of this model, that unit is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos.

UnitAbilities.Title: Daemon Lord of Nurgle (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Nurgle Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6" of this model, add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of models in that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Nurgle’s Rot (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit within 12" of this model. Until the start of your next Movement phase, subtract 1 from the Toughness characteristic of models in that unit

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-7 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Poxbringer
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Feculent Despair (Aura, Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, each time that unit takes a Battle-shock test, subtract 1 from that test.

UnitAbilities.Title: Keep Counting!
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Meet Your Quota!
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Blessed by the Plague God
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

UnitAbilities.Title: Tally of Pestilence
UnitAbilities.Text: Keep a tally of how many enemy models are destroyed by Nurgle Legiones Daemonica models from your army during the battle. At the start of your Command phase, if this tally is 7 or more, you gain 1CP and the tally is reset to 0.

UnitAbilities.Title: Jolly Gutpipes
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Move characteristic of models in that unit and you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Disease of Mirth (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of the Fight phase, every enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within 6" of this model must take a Battle-shock test.

UnitAbilities.Title: Beast Handler
UnitAbilities.Text:
While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll charge rolls made for that unit. In addition, once per battle, you can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention stratagem, regardless of any other uses of that stratagem this phase. If you do:
▪ That use is -1 CP.
▪ That use does not prevent any uses of that stratagem on other units this phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Seed the Garden of Nurgle
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your Movement phase, if this model is within one Area Terrain feature, until the end of the battle, that Area Terrain feature is considered to be within your army’s Shadow of Chaos.

UnitAbilities.Title: Daemonic Icon
UnitAbilities.Text: Models in the bearer’s unit have a Leadership characteristic of 6+.

UnitAbilities.Title: Instrument of Chaos
UnitAbilities.Text: Add 1 to Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Infected Outbreak
UnitAbilities.Text: If you control an objective marker at the end of your Command phase and this unit is within range of that objective marker, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

UnitAbilities.Title: Mischief Makers
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an enemy unit (excluding Titanic units) within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability is selected to fight, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes a melee attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Grotesque Regeneration
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of each phase, if a Beasts of Nurgle model in this unit has lost any wounds but is not destroyed, that model regains all of its lost wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Daemonic Icon
UnitAbilities.Text: Models in the bearer’s unit have a Leadership characteristic of 6+.

UnitAbilities.Title: Instrument of Chaos
UnitAbilities.Text: Add 1 to Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Death’s Heads
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, each time a friendly Nurgle Legiones Daemonica unit makes an attack that targets that unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Shroud of Flies (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Nurgle Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6" of this Fortification, models in that unit have the Stealth ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Diseased Cover
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Fortification, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fortification
UnitAbilities.Text:
While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more Fortifications from your army:
	▪ That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made, unless it is made with a Pistol, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. 
	▪ Models in that unit so not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battle-shocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

UnitAbilities.Title: Greater Daemon of Slaanesh (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Slaanesh Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6" of this model, that unit is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos.

UnitAbilities.Title: No Prey Can Evade
UnitAbilities.Text: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this model.

UnitAbilities.Title: Monarch of the Hunt
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of the first battle round, select one enemy unit to be this model’s quarry. Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets its quarry, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll. Each time this model’s quarry is destroyed, select one new enemy unit to be this model’s quarry.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-7 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Weapons.Name: Pavane of Slaanesh – focused witchfire
Weapons.Keywords: HAZARDOUS, DEVASTATING WOUNDS, PSYCHIC, SUSTAINED HITS 3

UnitAbilities.Title: Greater Daemon of Slaanesh (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Slaanesh Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6" of this model, that unit is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos.

UnitAbilities.Title: Daemon Lord of Slaanesh (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Slaanesh Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6" of this model, improve the Armour Penetration of melee weapons in that unit by 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Mesmerising Form
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an attack targets this model, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Shining Aegis
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer has a Save characteristic of 3+.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-6 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Harmonic Alignment
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return D3 destroyed Bodyguard models to that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Discordant Disruption (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While an enemy Psyker unit is within 12" of this model, Psychic weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [HAZARDOUS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: The Eternal Dance
UnitAbilities.Text:
At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within 6" of this model. Until the end of the phase: 
	▪ Each time a friendly Slaanesh Legiones Daemonica model makes a melee attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Wound roll. 
	▪ Each time a model in that enemy unit makes a melee attack, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Dazzling Acrobatics
UnitAbilities.Text: This model is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

UnitAbilities.Title: Prince of Slaanesh
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, a successful unmodified Wound roll of 5+ scores a Critical Wound.

UnitAbilities.Title: Delightful Agonies
UnitAbilities.Text: The first time this model is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

Weapons.Keywords: DEVASTATING WOUNDS, IGNORES COVER, PSYCHIC, TORRENT

Weapons.Name: Cacophonic choir – focused witchfire
Weapons.Keywords: PSYCHIC, HAZARDOUS, IGNORES COVER, DEVASTATING WOUNDS, TORRENT

UnitAbilities.Title: Swallow Energy (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds and Psychic Attacks.

UnitAbilities.Title: Horrible Fascination(Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, one Psyker model from your army with this ability can use it. If it does, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to that Psyker model and roll one D6: on a 1, that Psyker model suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2-5, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll; on a 6, that enemy unit is not eligible to shoot this phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Tranceweaver
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target of that attack is within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Symphony of Pain (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. Until the end of the turn, each time a Slaanesh Legiones Daemonica model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Horrifying Beauty
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of one of more units from your army with this ability must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result if that enemy unit is Below Half-strength.

UnitAbilities.Title: Daemonic Icon
UnitAbilities.Text: Models in the bearer’s unit have a Leadership characteristic of 6+.

UnitAbilities.Title: Instrument of Chaos
UnitAbilities.Text: Add 1 to Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Soporific Musk
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability Falls Back, models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests. When doing so, if that enemy unit is also Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

UnitAbilities.Title: Unholy Speed
UnitAbilities.Text: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Daemonic Icon
UnitAbilities.Text: Models in the bearer’s unit have a Leadership characteristic of 6+.

UnitAbilities.Title: Instrument of Chaos
UnitAbilities.Text: Add 1 to Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: The Dark Master (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: The area of the battlefield within 6" of this model is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos.

UnitAbilities.Title: Shadow Form
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of the battle round, select one Shadow Form ability. Until the end of the battle round, this model has that ability.

Infos.Title: SUPREME COMMANDER
Infos.Text: If this model is in your army, it must be your Warlord.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-7 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Sections.Title: Wreathed in Shadows (Aura, Psychic)
Sections.Text: While a friendly Legiones Daemonica unit or Shadow Legion unit is within 6" of this model, that unit can only be targeted by a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

Sections.Title: Pall of Despair (Aura, Psychic)
Sections.Text: In the Battle-shock step of your opponent’s Command phase, if an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength is within 9" of this model, that unit must take a Battle-shock test. For the purposes of this ability, if a unit has a Starting Strength of 1, it is considered to be below its Starting Strength while it has lost one or more wounds. In addition, for each enemy unit that fails a Battle-shock test within 9" of this model, this model regains up to D3 lost wounds.

Sections.Title: Shadow Lord (Aura, Psychic)
Sections.Text: While a friendly Legiones Daemonica or Shadow Legion unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

Weapons.Name: Betraying Shades – focused witchfire
Weapons.Keywords: DEVASTATING WOUNDS, HAZARDOUS, IGNORES COVER, PSYCHIC

UnitAbilities.Title: Scuttling Walker
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a Normal or Advance move, it can move over friendly Monster and Vehicle models and terrain features that are 4" or less in height as if they were not there.

Infos.Title: DAEMONIC ALLEGIANCE
Infos.Text:
When you select this model to include in your army, you must select one of the keywords below. Until the end of the battle, this model has that keyword and the additional wargear stated for that keyword below.

Khorne: This model is additionally equipped with: torrent of burning blood.
Tzeentch: This model is additionally equipped with: warp gaze.
Nurgle: This model is additionally equipped with: phlegm bombardment.
Slaanesh: This model is additionally equipped with: scream of despair.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Daemonic Lord
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly Legiones Daemonica Infantry units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Prince of Darkness (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6" of this model, models in that unit have the Stealth ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Unholy Vigour
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, this model has a 3+ invulnerable save.

Infos.Title: DAEMONIC ALLEGIANCE
Infos.Text:
When you select this model to include in your army, you must select one of the following keywords for it to gain:
	▪ Khorne
	▪ Tzeentch
	▪ Nurgle
	▪ Slaanesh

The keyword you select will also affect some of this model’s characteristics.

Sections.Title: Daemon Prince of Khorne
Sections.Text: If this model has the Khorne keyword, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of this model’s hellforged weapons.

Sections.Title: Daemon Prince of Tzeentch
Sections.Text: If this model has the Tzeentch keyword, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s infernal cannon.

Sections.Title: Daemon Prince of Nurgle
Sections.Text: If this model has the Nurgle keyword, add 1 to this model’s Toughness characteristic.

Sections.Title: Daemon Prince of Slaanesh
Sections.Text: If this model has the Slaanesh keyword, add 2" to this model’s Move characteristic.

Units.Name: DAEMON PRINCE OF CHAOS WITH WINGS

ModelCompositions.ModelName: Daemon Prince of Chaos with Wings

UnitAbilities.Title: Malefic Destruction
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s hellforged weapons.

UnitAbilities.Title: Harbinger of Death
UnitAbilities.Text:
Each time this model is selected to fight, select one of the following abilities. Until the end of the phase, this model’s hellforged weapons have that ability:
	▪ [LETHAL HITS] 
	▪ [PRECISION] 
	▪ [SUSTAINED HITS 1]

Infos.Title: DAEMONIC ALLEGIANCE
Infos.Text:
When you select this model to include in your army, you must select one of the following keywords for it to gain:
	▪ Khorne
	▪ Tzeentch
	▪ Nurgle
	▪ Slaanesh

The keyword you select will also affect some of this model’s characteristics.

Sections.Title: Daemon Prince of Khorne
Sections.Text: If this model has the Khorne keyword, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of this model’s hellforged weapons.

Sections.Title: Daemon Prince of Tzeentch
Sections.Text: If this model has the Tzeentch keyword, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s infernal cannon.

Sections.Title: Daemon Prince of Nurgle
Sections.Text: If this model has the Nurgle keyword, add 1 to this model’s Toughness characteristic.

Sections.Title: Daemon Prince of Slaanesh
Sections.Text: If this model has the Slaanesh keyword, add 2" to this model’s Move characteristic.

Keywords: Daemon Prince of Chaos with Wings

UnitAbilities.Title: Pack Leader
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Prey of the Blood God
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of the first battle round, select one enemy unit to be this model's prey. Each time a model in this model's unit makes a melee attack that targets its prey, you can re-roll the Wound roll. Each time this model's prey is destroyed, select one new enemy unit to be this model's prey.

UnitAbilities.Title: Brass Collar of Bloody Vengeance
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 3+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Cutting Down the Foe
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, if this unit made a Charge move this turn, improve the Strength and Damage characteristics of that attack by 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Tormentbringer (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Slaanesh Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6" of this model, melee weapons in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Hysterical Frenzy (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this model's unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

Rule.Title: UNHOLY AVALANCHE
Rule.Text: If a friendly Legiones Daemonica Mounted unit made a fall-back move this turn, that move does not prevent that unit from being eligible to shoot/eligible to declare a charge.

Stratagems.Name: From Beyond the Veil
Stratagems.When: End of the Movement phase, from the start of the battle.
Stratagems.Target: One friendly Legiones Daemonica Mounted unit in strategic reserves.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make an ingress move.

Stratagems.Name: Warp-riders
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Legiones Daemonica Mounted unit is selected to move.
Stratagems.Target: That Legiones Daemonica Mounted unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit has Mobile.

Stratagems.Name: Inescapable Manifestations
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when a unit is selected to make a fall-back move, if that unit is engaged with a friendly Legiones Daemonica Mounted unit.
Stratagems.Target: That Legiones Daemonica Mounted unit.
Stratagems.Effect: When an enemy unit engaged with your unit is selected to make a fall-back move, that enemy unit must use the desperate escape mode. If that enemy unit is battle-shocked, -1 from those hazard rolls.

Enhancements.Name: Apocalyptic Steeds
Enhancements.Description: Legiones Daemonica Mounted unit only. This unit has +1" M.

Enhancements.Name: Soul-shattering Charge
Enhancements.Description: Legiones Daemonica Mounted unit only. When this unit is selected to fight, if this unit made a charge move this turn, you can use this ability. If you do, when determining which models in this unit can fight, friendly models that are within 3" of enemy units engaged with this unit can target those enemy units.

Rule.Title: LOCI OF POWER
Rule.Text: Friendly Legiones Daemonica Character models (excluding Monster models) have +1 Ld and OC.

Stratagems.Name: Carnival of Excess
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, when an enemy unit has fought.
Stratagems.Target: One friendly Legiones Daemonica Character Slaanesh unit (excluding Monster units) that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit has Fights First and must be the next unit you select to fight.

Stratagems.Name: Call to Murder
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, when a friendly Legiones Daemonica Khorne Character unit (excluding Monster units) that made a charge move this turn is selected to fight.
Stratagems.Target: That Legiones Daemonica Character Khorne unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit’s melee attacks have +1 A.

Stratagems.Name: Bilious Blessing
Stratagems.When: Start of your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One friendly Legiones Daemonica Character Nurgle unit (excluding Monster units).
Stratagems.Effect:
Select one visible enemy unit within 8" of your unit and roll seven D6:
▪ For each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

Stratagems.Name: Skirling Magicks
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Legiones Daemonica Character Tzeentch unit (excluding Monster units) is selected to shoot.
Stratagems.Target: That Legiones Daemonica Character Tzeentch unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit’s ranged attacks have [LETHAL HITS].

Enhancements.Name: Swollen with Power
Enhancements.Description: Legiones Daemonica Character model only (excluding Monster units). This model has +2 W.

Rule.Title: SHUDDERBLINK
Rule.Text:
When a friendly Legiones Daemonica Battleline unit is selected to make an advance move:
▪ That unit’s ranged attacks have [ASSAULT] until the end of the turn.
▪ That move does not prevent that unit from being eligible to declare a charge.

Stratagems.Name: Daemonic Infestation
Stratagems.When: Your Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One friendly Legiones Daemonica Battleline unit (excluding Pink Horrors units).
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit heals 3 wounds.

Stratagems.Name: Soulseeing
Stratagems.When: Start of your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One friendly Legiones Daemonica Battleline unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one visible enemy unit within 12" of your unit. That enemy unit has +6" detection range.

Stratagems.Name: Incorporeal Entities
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly Legiones Daemonica Battleline unit.
Stratagems.Target: That Legiones Daemonica Battleline unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Ranged attacks that target your unit with a S greater than your unit’s T have -1 to wound rolls.

Enhancements.Name: Bane-forged Weapons
Enhancements.Description: Legiones Daemonica Battleline unit only. This unit’s attacks have +1 S.

Enhancements.Name: Soul-hungry Slaughterers
Enhancements.Description: Legiones Daemonica Battleline unit only. When you target this unit with the Heroic Intervention/Fire Overwatch stratagem, that use is -1 CP.

Rule.Title: WARP RIFTS
Rule.Text: Each time a Legiones Daemonica unit from your army is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, if it is set up wholly within your army’s Shadow of Chaos, and/or if it is set up wholly within 6" of one or more friendly Bloodthirster, Great Unclean One, Kairos Fateweaver, Keeper of Secrets, Lord of Change, Rotigus, Shalaxi Helbane or Skarbrand units with which it shares the Khorne, Tzeentch, Nurgle or Slaanesh keyword it can be set up anywhere that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models, instead of more than 8".

Stratagems.Name: Corrupt Realspace
Stratagems.When: Start of any Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Legiones Daemonica unit from your army that is within range of an objective marker you control.
Stratagems.Effect: That objective marker is said to be Corrupted and remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn In addition, while an objective marker is Corrupted and under your control, the area of the battlefield within 6" of that objective marker is considered to be within your army’s Shadow of Chaos.

Stratagems.Name: Warp Surge
Stratagems.When: Your Charge phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Legiones Daemonica unit from your army that is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

Stratagems.Name: Draught of Terror
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Legiones Daemonica unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1. In addition, until the end of the phase, each time such a weapon targets a unit that is Battle-shocked, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Denizens of The Warp
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Legiones Daemonica unit from your army that is arriving using the Deep Strike ability this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models.

Stratagems.Name: The Realm of Chaos
Stratagems.When: End of your opponent’s turn.
Stratagems.Target: Up to two Legiones Daemonica units from your army that are within your army’s Shadow of Chaos, or one other Legiones Daemonica unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Remove the targeted units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves. They will arrive back on the battlefield in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase using the Deep Strike ability.
Stratagems.Restrictions: You cannot target units that are within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units with this Stratagem.

Stratagems.Name: Daemonic Invulnerability
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Legiones Daemonica unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of that enemy unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an invulnerable saving throw is made for a model in your unit, re-roll a saving throw of 1.

Enhancements.Name: A’rgath, the King of Blades
Enhancements.Description: Khorne Legiones Daemonica model only. Add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. While the bearer is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos, add 2 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

Enhancements.Name: The Everstave
Enhancements.Description: Tzeentch Legiones Daemonica model only. Add 1 to the Strength characteristic of the bearer’s ranged weapons and increase the Range characteristic of such weapons by 3". While the bearer is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of the bearer’s ranged weapons and increase the Range characteristic of such weapons by 6" instead.

Enhancements.Name: The Endless Gift
Enhancements.Description: Nurgle Legiones Daemonica model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

Enhancements.Name: Soulstealer
Enhancements.Description: Slaanesh Legiones Daemonica model only. Each time the bearer destroys an enemy model with a melee attack, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if the bearer is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos. On a 4+, the bearer regains 1 lost wound.

Rule.Title: BEGUILING AURA
Rule.Text:
Legiones Daemonica Slaanesh units from your army are eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which they Fell Back.

SEDUCTIVE GAMBIT
Legiones Daemonica Slaanesh units from your army have the following ability:
Seductive Gambit: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, you can declare it will perform a Seductive Gambit. If you do, until the end of the turn, this unit does not have the Fights First ability, but instead, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

Stratagems.Name: Thieves of Pain
Stratagems.Category: LEGION OF EXCESS - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Any phase, just after an attack or mortal wound is allocated to a model in a Legiones Daemonica Slaanesh unit from your army (excluding Monsters and Vehicles).
Stratagems.Target: That Legiones Daemonica Slaanesh unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one other friendly Legiones Daemonica Slaanesh unit that is within 9" of and visible to your unit. Until the end of the phase, while the selected unit is on the battlefield, each time a model in your unit would lose a wound, inflict 1 mortal wound on the selected unit instead.

Stratagems.Name: Archagonists
Stratagems.Category: LEGION OF EXCESS - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Legiones Daemonica Slaanesh Monster unit or up to two Legiones Daemonica Slaanesh units (excluding Monsters) from your army that have not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in one of those units makes an attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Sensory Excruciation
Stratagems.Category: LEGION OF EXCESS - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Legiones Daemonica Slaanesh Monster unit from your army that is on the battlefield.
Stratagems.Effect:
Each unit on the battlefield that is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos must take a Battle‑shock test, subtracting 1 from that test if they are Below Half‑strength. 

Designer’s Note: This Stratagem forces all friendly and enemy units alike within your army’s Shadow of Chaos to take a Battle‑shock test. This can allow a Chaos Daemons player to heal units from their army through the Daemonic Terror army rule, at the risk of causing some of their own units to become Battle‑shocked.

Stratagems.Name: Phantasmal Longing
Stratagems.Category: LEGION OF EXCESS - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Legiones Daemonica Slaanesh unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a move, it can move through terrain features.

Stratagems.Name: Cavalcade of Blades
Stratagems.Category: LEGION OF EXCESS - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Charge phase, just after a Legiones Daemonica Slaanesh unit from your army ends a Charge move.
Stratagems.Target: That Legiones Daemonica Slaanesh unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit, then roll one D6 for each model in your unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit, or roll six D6 instead if your unit is a Monster unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

Stratagems.Name: Overwhelming Excess
Stratagems.Category: LEGION OF EXCESS - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Legiones Daemonica Slaanesh unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Enhancements.Name: False Majesty (Aura)
Enhancements.Description: Legiones Daemonica Slaanesh model only. While a friendly Legiones Daemonica Slaanesh unit (excluding Monsters) is within 6" of the bearer, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

Enhancements.Name: Dreaming Crown (Aura)
Enhancements.Description: Legiones Daemonica Slaanesh model only. While a friendly Legiones Daemonica Slaanesh unit (excluding Monsters) is within 6" of the bearer, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

Enhancements.Name: Avatar of Perfection
Enhancements.Description: Legiones Daemonica Slaanesh Monster model only. At the start of each phase, if there are no other friendly units within 6" of the bearer, you can: re‑roll Advance rolls made for the bearer; re‑roll Charge rolls made for the bearer; ignore any or all modifiers to its Move characteristic and to any Advance and/or Charge rolls made for the bearer.

Enhancements.Name: Soul Glutton
Enhancements.Description: Legiones Daemonica Slaanesh Monster model only. At the end of the Fight phase, if one or more enemy models were destroyed this phase as a result of one or more of the bearer’s attacks, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, it regains up to D3 lost wounds.

Rule.Title: FATES IN FLUX
Rule.Text:
You start the battle with three Flux tokens (we recommend using a dice to track how many Flux tokens you have). You can spend one Flux token just after an Advance roll, Hit roll, Wound roll, Damage roll, saving throw or Hazardous test is made for a Legiones Daemonica Tzeentch model or Legiones Daemonica Tzeentch unit from your army to re‑roll the result of that roll, throw or test. Flux tokens can also be spent to enhance the effect of some Stratagems. Each time you spend a Flux token, reduce the number of Flux tokens you have by one and your opponent gains one Flux token.

Whenever your opponent has one or more Flux tokens, they can spend one Flux token after an Advance roll, Hit roll, Wound roll or saving throw is made for a model or unit from their army, to re‑roll the result of that roll or throw. If they do, they reduce the number of Flux tokens they have by one and you gain one Flux token. This is ignored if your opponent has the Fates in Flux Detachment rule.

In your Command phase, if your opponent has one or more Flux tokens, you gain one Flux token.

Designer’s Note: When using fast dice rolling, this rule can be used to spend any number of Flux tokens (up to the amount you have), to re‑roll a number of dice up to the amount spent, after rolling multiple rolls or saving throws at once.

Stratagems.Name: Impossible Eclipse
Stratagems.When: Any phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Legiones Daemonica Tzeentch Monster unit from your army that is on the battlefield.
Stratagems.Effect: Select No Man’s Land or your opponent’s deployment zone, or spend one Flux token and select both. Until the end of the phase, the selected areas of the battlefield are within your army’s Shadow of Chaos.

Stratagems.Name: Pyrogenesis
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Legiones Daemonica Tzeentch unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight that phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of weapons equipped by models in your unit, or spend one Flux token and add 3 to the Strength characteristic of those weapons and improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1 instead.

Stratagems.Name: Flickering Reality
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Legiones Daemonica Tzeentch unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Roll one D6, then you can spend one Flux token to re‑roll the result: until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, on an unmodified Hit roll (after any re‑roll) of that result, the attack sequence ends, even if the original Hit roll would have been a Critical Hit. Example: If you roll a 2 and choose to spend one Flux token to re-roll the result, and the re-roll is a 6, then until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, on an unmodified Hit roll of 6 the attack sequence ends, that attack fails to hit and no Critical Hit effects (e.g. Lethal Hits) are resolved.

Stratagems.Name: Fateborne Nightmares
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Legiones Daemonica Tzeentch unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a move, it can move through terrain features.

Stratagems.Name: Ficklefire
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Legiones Daemonica Tzeentch unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, enemy units are not considered to be within Engagement Range of your unit for the purposes of selecting targets for, and resolving attacks with, ranged weapons. Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy model is destroyed while its unit is within Engagement Range of your unit, roll one D6: on a 5+, your unit suffers 1 mortal wound after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks.

Stratagems.Name: Delirium Unmade
Stratagems.When: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Legiones Daemonica Tzeentch unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units. Alternatively, you can spend one Flux token when you use this Stratagem and target up to two Legiones Daemonica Tzeentch units from your army instead (including those within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units).
Stratagems.Effect: Remove your units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

Enhancements.Name: Inescapable Eye
Enhancements.Description: Legiones Daemonica Tzeentch model only. In your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, if your opponent has one or more Flux tokens, you gain one additional Flux token.

Enhancements.Name: Infernal Puppeteer
Enhancements.Description:
Legiones Daemonica Tzeentch Monster  model only. In your Shooting phase, the bearer  can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the  end of the phase, you can select one other  friendly visible Legiones Daemonica Tzeentch  unit within 9" of the bearer. If you do, when  selecting targets for ranged weapons equipped  by the bearer, you can measure range and  determine visibility from one model of your  choice in the selected unit instead.
Designer’s Note: When determining if a unit  with the Lone Operative ability can be selected  as the target, the range is determined from the  model of your choice in the selected unit.

Enhancements.Name: Neverblade
Enhancements.Description: Legiones Daemonica Tzeentch Monster model only. Improve the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 2, improve the Attacks and Armour Penetration characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 1, and each time the bearer makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

Enhancements.Name: Improbable Shield (Aura)
Enhancements.Description: Legiones Daemonica Tzeentch model only. While a friendly Legiones Daemonica Tzeentch unit is within 6" of the bearer, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.

Rule.Title: MURDERCALL
Rule.Text:
In your opponent’s movement phase, each time an enemy unit (excluding Aircraft) ends a move within 8" of one or more Legiones Daemonica Khorne units from your army, one of those Legiones Daemonica Khorne units can make a surge move of up to D6".

BLOOD TAINTED
At the end of a phase in which a Legiones Daemonica Khorne unit from your army destroyed an enemy unit that was within range of an objective marker at the start of the phase, if your unit has a higher Level of Control over that objective marker, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

Stratagems.Name: Wrath Undeniable
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Legiones Daemonica Khorne unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

Stratagems.Name: Gore‑hungry Onslaught
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Legiones Daemonica Khorne unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a move, it can move through terrain features.

Stratagems.Name: Skulls Beget Blood
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Legiones Daemonica Khorne Infantry or Legiones Daemonica Khorne Mounted unit from your army (excluding units that Fell Back this turn) that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one enemy unit that is not within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army and is within 8" of and visible to your unit. Roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

Stratagems.Name: Blood Begets Skulls
Stratagems.When: Your Charge phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Legiones Daemonica Khorne unit from your army that has not been selected to charge this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

Stratagems.Name: Fools’ Flight
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a fall-back move.
Stratagems.Target: One friendly unengaged Legiones Daemonica Khorne unit that is within 6" of that enemy unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Declare a charge with your unit. When selecting charge targets, you can only select enemy units that made a fall-back move this phase and are within the maximum distance.

Stratagems.Name: Sheathed In Brass
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Legiones Daemonica Khorne unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a Save characteristic of 3+.

Enhancements.Name: Slaughterthirst (Aura)
Enhancements.Description: Legiones Daemonica Khorne model only. While a friendly Legiones Daemonica Khorne unit (excluding Monsters) is within 6" of the bearer, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LANCE] ability.

Enhancements.Name: Fury’s Cage
Enhancements.Description: Legiones Daemonica Khorne Monster model only. Each time the bearer is selected to fight, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, the bearer suffers D3+1 mortal wounds, and until the end of the phase, each time it makes an attack, you can re‑roll the Hit roll and you can re‑roll the Wound roll.

Enhancements.Name: Brazenmaw
Enhancements.Description: Legiones Daemonica Khorne model only. Add 2 to Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

Enhancements.Name: Gateway Unto Damnation
Enhancements.Description: Legiones Daemonica Khorne Monster model only. The bearer’s Deadly Demise ability inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of 2+ instead of on a 6. In addition, if the bearer has destroyed one or more enemy units this battle, the bearer has the Deadly Demise D3+3 ability, instead of any other Deadly Demise ability on its datasheet.

Rule.Title: MELANCHOLIC MIASMA
Rule.Text: While an enemy unit is within 9" of one or more Legiones Daemonica Nurgle units from your army, that enemy unit is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos. In each player’s Command phase, select one enemy unit within your army’s Shadow of Chaos. That unit must take a Battle‑shock test.

Stratagems.Name: Seeping Virulence
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Legiones Daemonica Nurgle unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

Stratagems.Name: Fever Visions
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Legiones Daemonica Nurgle unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. After your unit has finished making its attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks; that enemy unit must take a Battle‑shock test.

Stratagems.Name: Foetid Resurgence
Stratagems.When: Your Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Legiones Daemonica Nurgle unit from your army that is on the battlefield.
Stratagems.Effect: Return up to 1 destroyed model to your unit, or up to D3 destroyed models instead if your unit is a Battleline unit, with their full wounds remaining. If it is a Monster unit, one model in your unit regains up to D3+1 lost wounds instead.

Stratagems.Name: Rot and Renewal
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Legiones Daemonica Nurgle unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a move, it can move through terrain features.

Stratagems.Name: Murkshadows
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Legiones Daemonica Nurgle Infantry unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal move, add 5" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

Stratagems.Name: Plague of Woes
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Command phase, before selecting any targets for the Melancholic Miasma Detachment rule.
Stratagems.Target: One Legiones Daemonica Nurgle unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, after an enemy unit takes a Battle‑shock test as a result of the Melancholic Miasma Detachment rule, select one other enemy unit within 9" of your unit; that enemy unit must take a Battle‑shock test.

Enhancements.Name: Cankerblight
Enhancements.Description: Legiones Daemonica Nurgle model only. Each time an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) that is within 6" of the bearer fails a Battle‑shock test, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, one model in that unit is destroyed (chosen by its controlling player). Each time the bearer uses this Enhancement, no mortal wounds are inflicted by your army’s Daemonic Terror rule.

Enhancements.Name: Maggot Maws
Enhancements.Description: Legiones Daemonica Nurgle model only. In your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 6" of the bearer; that enemy unit must take a Battle‑shock test. Then roll one D6: on a 3+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. Each time the bearer uses this Enhancement, no mortal wounds are inflicted by your army’s Daemonic Terror rule.

Enhancements.Name: Droning Shroud
Enhancements.Description: Legiones Daemonica Nurgle Monster model only. While a friendly Legiones Daemonica Nurgle unit is within 6" of the bearer, that unit can only be targeted by a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

Enhancements.Name: Font of Spores
Enhancements.Description: Legiones Daemonica Nurgle Monster model only. While a friendly Legiones Daemonica Nurgle unit is within 6" of the bearer, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.

Dettachments.Name: SHADOW LEGION

Rule.Title: FIRST PRINCE OF CHAOS
Rule.Text:
Units from your army have the relevant abilities presented below.

MURDERER’S COWL
Shadow Legion Khorne units only. This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

PENUMBRAL PUPPETRY
Shadow Legion Tzeentch units only. This unit has Stealth. Each time a melee attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

GLOAM ROT
Shadow Legion Nurgle units only. Each time an attack targets this unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than this unit’s Toughness characteristic, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

SHADOW’S CARESS
Shadow Legion Slaanesh units only. Enemy units cannot target this unit with snap shooting attacks.

DISCIPLES OF Be’lakor
Shadow Legion Undivided units only.
▪ This unit has the Dark Pacts army rule, and can use it as described in Codex: Chaos Space Marines, even though your Army Faction is not Heretic Astartes. If this unit is Be’lakor, it automatically passes the Leadership test required for Dark Pacts.
▪ Shadow Legion Heretic Astartes models in this unit have the Deep Strike ability.

THRALLS OF THE FIRST PRINCE
When mustering your army, you cannot include any Daemon Prince, Daemon Prince with Wings or Epic Hero units (excluding Be’lakor), but you can include the following Heretic Astartes units:
▪ Chaos Lord
▪ Chaos Lord in Terminator Armour
▪ Chaos Lord With Jump Pack
▪ Chaos Terminator Squad
▪ Chosen
▪ Damned units
▪ Dark Apostle
▪ Havocs
▪ Legionaries
▪ Master of Possession
▪ Possessed
▪ Raptors
▪ Sorcerer
▪ Sorcerer in Terminator Armour
▪ Warp Talons
The combined points value of such units depends on your battle size, as shown below.
▪ Incursion: Up to 500 pts
▪ Strike Force: Up to 1000 pts
▪ Onslaught: Up to 1500 pts

KEYWORDS
Be’lakor and Heretic Astartes units from your army gain the Shadow Legion and Undivided keywords.
Legiones Daemonica units from your army gain the Shadow Legion keyword.

Stratagems.Name: Spiteful Demise
Stratagems.When: Any phase, just after a Shadow Legion unit from your army is destroyed, before removing the last model in that unit from the battlefield and before rolling any dice for the Deadly Demise ability
Stratagems.Target: That Shadow Legion unit. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
Stratagems.Effect: Roll one D6 for each enemy unit that is within Engagement Range of the last model in your unit, adding 2 to the result if your unit has the Slaanesh keyword: on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds

Stratagems.Name: Channelled Wrath
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Shadow Legion unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LANCE] ability. If your unit has the Khorne keyword, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1 as well.

Stratagems.Name: Death Denied
Stratagems.When: Your Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Shadow Legion unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: One model in your unit regains up to 3 lost wounds. In addition, If your unit has the Tzeentch keyword, return up to one destroyed model (excluding Character models) to your unit with its full wounds remaining.

Stratagems.Name: Encroaching Darkness
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: Up to one Shadow Legion Heretic Astartes unit from your army and up to one Shadow Legion Legiones Daemonica unit from your army. You can only select units that arrived from Reserves this turn.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your selected units have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

Stratagems.Name: Shade Path
Stratagems.When: Start of your opponent’s Charge phase.
Stratagems.Target: One friendly Shadow Legion unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one visible enemy unit within 12" of your unit. When that enemy unit declares a charge, that enemy unit has -1 to charge rolls. If your unit has Nurgle, that enemy unit must make a battle-shock roll.

Stratagems.Name: Binding Shadow
Stratagems.When: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: Up to one Shadow Legion Heretic Astartes unit from your army and up to one Shadow Legion Legiones Daemonica unit from your army. You can only select units that are not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
Stratagems.Effect: Remove those selected units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

Enhancements.Name: Leaping Shadows
Enhancements.Description: Shadow Legion model only. Models in the bearer's unit have the Scouts 9" ability.

Enhancements.Name: Mantle of Gloom (Aura)
Enhancements.Description: Shadow Legion model only. While an enemy unit is within Engagement Range of the bearer's unit, subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that enemy unit.

Enhancements.Name: Fade to Darkness
Enhancements.Description: Shadow Legion model only. At the end of the Fight phase, if the bearer's unit destroyed one or more enemy units this phase and is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove the bearer's unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Enhancements.Name: Malice Made Manifest
Enhancements.Description: Shadow Legion model only. At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer's unit and roll one D6: on a 2‑5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

RestrictedUnits: DAEMON PRINCE OF CHAOS WITH WINGS

ArmyRules.Title: THE SHADOW OF CHAOS
ArmyRules.Text:
If your Army Faction is Legiones Daemonica, certain areas of the battlefield are considered to be within your army’s Shadow of Chaos, as follows: 

	▪ Your deployment zone is always within your army’s Shadow of Chaos. 
	▪ At the start of any phase, if you control at least half of the objective markers within No Man’s Land, until the end of that phase, No Man’s Land is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos. 
	▪ At the start of any phase, if you control at least half of the objective markers within your opponent’s deployment zone, until the end of that phase, your opponent’s deployment zone is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos. 

DAEMONIC MANIFESTATION
While a Legiones Daemonica unit from your army is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos, each time that unit takes a Battle-shock test, add 1 to that test and, if that test is passed, one model in that unit regains up to D3 lost wounds (if that unit is a Battleline unit and that test is passed, up to D3 destroyed models can be returned to that unit instead). 

DAEMONIC TERROR
While an enemy unit is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos and/or it is within 6" of one or more Bloodthirster, Great Unclean One, Kairos Fateweaver, Keeper of Secrets, Lord of Change, Rotigus, Shalaxi Helbane or Skarbrand units from your army, each time that unit takes a Battle-shock test, subtract 1 from that test and, if that test is failed, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

ArmyRules.Title: DAEMONIC PACT
ArmyRules.Text:
If every model from your army has the Chaos Knights or Heretic Astartes keyword, you can include Legiones Daemonica units in your army, even if they do not have the Faction keyword you selected in the Select Army Faction step. The combined points cost of such units you can include depends on your battle size, as shown below.

	▪ Incursion - Up to 250 pts
	▪ Strike Force - Up to 500 pts
	▪ Onslaught - Up to 750 pts

 None of these models can be your Warlord, and they cannot be given Enhancements.

 In addition, for each of the following keywords, the number of non-Battleline units with that keyword you include in this way cannot be greater than the number of Battleline units with that keyword you include in this way:
	▪ Khorne
	▪ Tzeentch
	▪ Nurgle
	▪ Slaanesh
